since_last: 80% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.71%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.18% · Gold +0.51% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 80% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.71%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.71%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +11.97%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +11.97%, AMAT +10.82%, PANW +9.14%, TSLA +8.46%, LRCX +8.39%. Laggards: SMCI -8.10%, SYNA -2.99%, DLR -1.25%, MSFT -1.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +7.15% at $164.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +7.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
